title: TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|reb|italics=1}} {{Redlink}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:TIE_Fighter_The_Official_Strategy_Guide.jpg]] |title=''TIE Fighter:
The Official Strategy Guide'' |author=*[[Rusel DeMaria]] *[[David Wessman]] *[[David Maxwell]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Prima Games|Prima Publishing]] |release date=[[July 18]], [[1994]]{{Amazon|url=TIE-Fighter-Official-Strategy-Secrets/dp/1559585196|text=TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide (Secrets of the games series)}} |type=Paperback |pages=408 |dimensions=7.2 x 1 x 9.5 inches |weight=1.6 pounds |isbn=9781559585194 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide''''' is the official [[Prima Games|Prima Publishing]] guide to [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] written by [[Rusel DeMaria]], [[David Wessman]] and [[David Maxwell]]. It continued the story from ''[[The Stele Chronicles]]'' and also had walkthroughs for each mission in the game. A subsequent edition, ''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]'', featured walkthroughs for the ''Defender of the Empire'' and ''Enemy of the Empire'' expansion packs. {{Book-stub}} ==Publisher's summary== Luke Skywalker, Princess Leia, Han Solo, Chewbacca the Wookiee, and the other characters you know from ''Star Wars'' are now the enemy, the Force has been helping those Rebel Alliance X-wing fighters for too long! As a young Imperial Navy Academy cadet, you must first train and then go into action against the Rebels and other enemies of the Empire to help ensure Imperial rule over the galaxy. Written by the author of ''The Stele Chronicles'', this handbook continues the story of Tan Stele's adventures. ''TIE Fighter'' players learn every important detail as well as each strategy and tactic needed to succeed at the adrenaline-pumping missions. ''TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide'' is the ultimate resource for fans of LucasArts Entertainment Company's hit game. Included in this book are: *General tactics and strategies for flying each Imperial spacecraft *Winning strategies for each of the more than 50 missions and major battles devised by the game's designers and testers *Revealing bios of Larry Holland, Ed Kilham, and the ''TIE Fighter'' design team *More of ''The Stele Chronicles'', the exciting novella included with the game *Detailed statistics for every mission—things only the programmers have known, until now! ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9781559585194}}; [[July 18]], [[1994]]; [[Prima Games|Prima Publishing]]; US paperback ==Appearances== {{App |characters= *[[Alimet]] {{1stID|Alimet}} *[[Hamo Blastwell]] *[[Buckeye]] {{1stm}} *[[Carith]] {{1stID|Carith and Grommet}} *[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] *[[Crundha]] {{1stm}} *[[Coross]] {{1stm}} *[[Flanken]] {{1stm}} *[[Foocl'd]] {{1stm}} *[[Harkov]] *[[Kechel]] {{1stm}} *[[Ketcher]] {{1stID|Ketcher}} *[[Maloc]] *[[Margoet]] {{1stm}} *[[Mariin (Imperial)|Mariin]] {{1stm}} *[[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] *[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] *[[Mordon (Human)|Mordon]] *[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] *[[Pargo]] *[[Prakrii]] {{1stm}} *"[[Priest (Secret Order of the Emperor)|Priest]]" *[[Ritton]] {{1stm}} *[[Saaryu]] {{1stm}} *[[Scott (NL-1)|Scott]] *[[Shreet]] {{1stm}} *[[S.
